string 2: Huh...?! Wh-Who are—?!
Wait. You're...

We're with D-SAT. We've received citizen reports
of a Digimon outside of the district.
Inori...!

...Digimon presence, confirmed. Come with us.
You'll be detained in the Digimon District.
St-Stop it!

I ask that you two come along voluntarily as well.
Why were you harboring a rogue Digimon?

There's no point trying to protect them, you know.
Their kind will turn on you at the drop of a hat.
All right. We won't try to resist, but... don't you remember us?

Now that you mention it... it does seem like I've
seen you somewhere before...
Where's your captain...? Captain Kuremi?
You know Captain Kuremi...?

On that day eight years ago, the captain was
mercilessly attacked by Digimon.
That's why he's no longer with us...!
Take them all into custody. We're withdrawing! Hurry!
Yes, sir!
Get in there!
What's wrong with those guys?!
So... I wonder what's going to happen to us...
It's been a while, hasn't it.
Wh-Who are you...?
Fair question. Not like you'd recognize me dressed this way.
I used to be a public safety officer... You don't remember?
We've spoken several times in the past.
Oh, that's right!
I'm glad you remember.
Allow me to introduce myself again... I'm Asuna Shiroki.
Wait, "Used to be"...? You aren't with public safety anymore?

I can't accept the current system that allows innocent 
Digimon to be harmed.

Recently, all rogue Digimon that are apprehended
are documented as having been sent to the district.

But my investigations have shown that certain Digimon
are being sent to this underground base instead.

I don't have any proof... but my gut tells me
they're being used as test subjects.
Test subjects?!

There's someone who'd like to meet you.
Truth be told... I'm here at this person's request.

I'll help you escape, but you'll need to do as I say
from this point on.
...Look over there.
*gasp*
That's horrible...!
Someone's coming... This way!
Hmm, very good.

The nature of these Digimon lifeforms will be
laid bare to us in no time at all!
I can barely notice Dr. Simmons' absence.

Hmph! Unlike that coward who quit and ran away,
when I have a job to do, I do it!
Escaping this place is our top priority now. Come on.

This underground passage doesn't have any surveillance
cameras yet and is off the sentry routes. It should be safe.
Oh, and...
Hey, long time, no speak.
It's Simmons. It's good to hear you're all okay.

Things have been pretty hectic on my end. I was forced
to transfer from the public safety office to D-SAT...

...where I was then ordered to develop a weapon
for eliminating Digimon.
Eliminating Digimon...

I said no, of course. Where's the beauty in something
like that?

I told them that the esteemed Dr. Yuki would never
build anything like a weapon for mass murder.
Dr. Yuki...?{next}

That name needs no introduction here in Japan, I'm sure. 
There's no one I respect more than him.

So I quit the public safety office... and now I'm researching
something far more important than I ever have.
The natural laws of this world.

...There's a place deep beneath Shinjuku called
"Rebellion Village."

That's where my research space is currently located.
What say we reconnect and have a little chat there?
Dr. Simmons made this special suit I'm wearing, too.

While I don't share her taste in fashion... I definitely
share her ideals.

What our former employers are doing is wrong, and we can't 
simply turn a blind eye.
We'd greatly appreciate your help in our efforts.
Follow me. I'll guide you to Rebellion Village.
